positive: A minimalist, highly stylized portrait of a forest animal, specifically a whimsical fox, sitting majestically on a cluster of glowing, geometric mushrooms. The fox is depicted in a clean silhouette with sharp lines and striking contrast against a deep, nocturnal indigo background. Incorporate elements of botanical illustration and art deco geometry. Use vibrant, neon accents (cyan, magenta, lime green) for the magical glow of the mushrooms and surrounding foliage, giving the piece an ethereal, synthwave feel. The composition must be central and symmetrical, optimized for a repeating print pattern. Clean lines, vector art aesthetic, highly detailed.
